seo.title: How to Use Peak-and-Trough Analysis in Trading
seo.description: Peak-and-trough analysis is a price action technique that helps traders understand market structure, identify trends, and spot potential reversals. This article explains how to read highs and lows effectively, assess momentum, and combine this method with indicators for better trading decisions.
